user_payload.normalized_incident_summary: Glyphosate mist entered eye causing burning sensation.

canonical_actions.instruction: Hold the eye open and rinse gently with clean water for 15-20 minutes.
Remove contact lenses after the first 5 minutes if present.
Call a physician or poison control center immediately.

escalation.instruction: Call a physician or poison control center immediately while or after rinsing.

parsed_json.incident_summary: Glyphosate mist entered eye causing burning sensation.

immediate_actions.instruction: Hold the eye open and rinse gently with clean water for 15-20 minutes.
Remove contact lenses after the first 5 minutes if present.
Call a physician or poison control center immediately.

escalate_now.instruction: Call a physician or poison control center immediately while or after rinsing.
escalate_now.reason: Chemical eye exposure requires professional medical evaluation.
